summary: P1 Features Testing Complete - Bot System for Merchant Voucher Auctions and Cashback Promotions. All 5 backend endpoints tested and working. Frontend Admin Panel shows all 4 tabs (Gutscheine, Premium Partner, Bots, Cashback Aktionen) with full functionality.

backend_configure_voucher_bots.description: Configures bots for all merchant voucher auctions with min/max percent range

backend_voucher_bot_status.description: Returns status of all merchant voucher auctions with bot configuration

backend_create_promotion.description: Creates temporary cashback promotion for a merchant

backend_remove_promotion.description: Removes/ends a cashback promotion for a merchant

frontend_admin_tabs.description: Admin Panel Händler-Gutscheine section has all 4 tabs
tabs_verified: Bots (8) - Shows bot configuration and status

frontend_bots_tab.description: Bots tab shows configuration and status
features_visible: Bots konfigurieren section with Min/Max Prozent inputs
Bots für alle Gutscheine aktivieren button
Bot-Status list showing all voucher auctions with Aktiv status

frontend_cashback_tab.description: Cashback Aktionen tab shows create form and active promotions
features_visible: Aktive Cashback-Aktionen list with Beenden button

frontend_create_promotion_ui.description: Creating promotion through UI works correctly
verified: Beenden button available to end promotion

critical_code_review_comments: bots.py: configure_voucher_bots endpoint correctly validates percent range (5-50%) and configures bots for all merchant_voucher auctions
bots.py: voucher_bot_status endpoint returns comprehensive status including auction_id, title, current_price, bot_target_price, bot_active
cashback_system.py: create-promotion endpoint validates rate (1-10%) and duration (1-30 days), checks both partner_accounts and users collections
cashback_system.py: get_promotions endpoint correctly filters by special_rate_until > now
cashback_system.py: remove-promotion endpoint properly clears special_rate and special_rate_until
AdminMerchantVouchers.js: All 4 tabs implemented with proper state management and API integration
AdminMerchantVouchers.js: Bot configuration UI allows setting min/max percent and shows real-time status
AdminMerchantVouchers.js: Cashback promotion UI allows partner selection, rate/duration input, and shows active promotions with end button
seed_data_creation: Created cashback promotion for Test Restaurant (8% for 7 days) during UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 Features fully tested: 1) Bot System: POST /api/admin/bots/configure-voucher-bots configures bots for all merchant voucher auctions with 10-30% target price range, GET /api/admin/bots/voucher-bot-status shows all 8 voucher auctions with active bots, 2) Cashback Promotions: POST /api/cashback/admin/create-promotion/{partner_id} creates temporary promotions (1-10% rate, 1-30 days), GET /api/cashback/admin/promotions lists active promotions, DELETE /api/cashback/admin/remove-promotion/{partner_id} ends promotions, 3) Frontend: Admin Panel > Händler-Gutscheine has 4 tabs (Gutscheine, Premium Partner, Bots, Cashback Aktionen), all functional with proper API integration
